response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth across languages and tools, with clear experience in testing infrastructure, CI/CD, and developer tooling — including building test runners and frameworks — which aligns with engineering productivity goals. However, he lacks explicit evidence of people management experience beyond workshops and open-source collaboration, and his recent career gap and role titles don't clearly reflect team leadership or roadmap ownership required for a Level II Manager role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools, test runners, and CI/CD infrastructure
Proven track record in test automation, TDD, and promoting engineering best practices through workshops
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and embedded systems with demonstrated system design skills
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience in employment history
Recent career gap since October 2025 raises questions about current engagement and readiness
Role titles and responsibilities lack emphasis on strategic roadmap planning or cross-team alignment
